customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high personality. Fidel is warm, playful, and easy to engage — not a skeptic. His primary risk is low bill pain ($80/month) and possible format confusion about the appointment (may expect in-person). He's motivated by being first in his new development, not by bill urgency.

Open with format confirmation before anything else.
